requirement_topic.en: Energy-Efficiency Label for Lighting (Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica — RTE INEN)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明能效标签（能效标签 Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica——RTE INEN）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明能效標籤（能效標籤 Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica——RTE INEN）

summary.en: Ecuador requires an energy-efficiency label (etiquetado de eficiencia energetica) for regulated lighting products, administered through INEN/MEER (the energy ministry) via the applicable RTE INEN energy-labelling technical regulation and the corresponding NTE INEN labelling standard. The label communicates an efficiency class derived from luminous efficacy (lm/W) and must appear on product packaging. This is the practical Ecuadorian counterpart to the EU Ecodesign + energy-label regime, but Ecuador relies on a labelling-and-information approach plus the Certificate of Conformity rather than an EU-style binding minimum-efficacy Ecodesign threshold. The label is presented as part of the conformity dossier and must be in Spanish. Exporters should confirm the current label format, efficiency classes, and the specific RTE INEN regulation in force for the product category.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔对受管制照明产品要求能效标签（能效标签，etiquetado de eficiencia energetica），通过适用的 RTE INEN 能效标签技术法规及相应 NTE INEN 标签标准，由 INEN/MEER（能源部）管理。标签传达基于光效（lm/W）得出的能效等级，须显示于产品包装上。这是欧盟生态设计 + 能效标签制度在厄瓜多尔的实务对应，但厄瓜多尔采用标签与信息披露方式并配合符合性证书，而非欧盟式具约束力的最低能效生态设计阈值。标签作为符合性档案的一部分提交，须使用西班牙语。出口商应确认现行标签格式、能效等级及该产品类别适用的具体 RTE INEN 法规。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾對受管制照明產品要求能效標籤（能效標籤，etiquetado de eficiencia energetica），通過適用的 RTE INEN 能效標籤技術法規及相應 NTE INEN 標籤標準，由 INEN/MEER（能源部）管理。標籤傳達基於光效（lm/W）得出的能效等級，須顯示於產品包裝上。這是歐盟生態設計 + 能效標籤制度在厄瓜多爾的實務對應，但厄瓜多爾採用標籤與信息披露方式並配合符合性證書，而非歐盟式具約束力的最低能效生態設計閾值。標籤作為符合性檔案的一部分提交，須使用西班牙語。出口商應確認現行標籤格式、能效等級及該產品類別適用的具體 RTE INEN 法規。

standards_or_laws: RTE INEN energy-labelling technical regulation for lighting products (etiquetado de eficiencia energetica)
Corresponding NTE INEN labelling / efficiency standard for lamps and luminaires
Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) — label evidence forms part of the dossier

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED room luminaires) together with the mandatory China Energy Label (CEL). GB 30255 defines absolute lm/W efficiency grades (Grade 1 highest, Grade 3 minimum for market entry) and the CEL must be registered with CQC/CECP and affixed before market placement. The CEL is China-specific; it is not recognized in Ecuador, and the grade boundaries and label format differ from the Ecuadorian energy-efficiency label.
summary.zh: 中国对应为 GB 30255（LED 室内照明产品能效限定值及能效等级）以及强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。GB 30255 规定绝对 lm/W 能效等级（1 级最高，3 级为市场准入最低），CEL 须向 CQC/CECP 注册并在上市前贴附。CEL 为中国特有；其在厄瓜多尔不被认可，且等级界限与标签格式与厄瓜多尔能效标签不同。
summary.zht: 中國對應為 GB 30255（LED 室內照明產品能效限定值及能效等級）以及強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。GB 30255 規定絕對 lm/W 能效等級（1 級最高，3 級為市場准入最低），CEL 須向 CQC/CECP 註冊並在上市前貼附。CEL 為中國特有；其在厄瓜多爾不被認可，且等級界限與標籤格式與厄瓜多爾能效標籤不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) — administered by SAMR / CQC / CECP

gap.en: The EU pairs a binding Ecodesign minimum-efficacy threshold (Reg 2019/2020) with an A-G energy label; Ecuador instead relies primarily on an energy-efficiency label under the applicable RTE INEN regulation, mapping the EU 'ecodesign' obligation chiefly onto a labelling requirement rather than a hard EU-style efficacy floor. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) the Chinese CEL is not accepted — an Ecuadorian energy-efficiency label, in Spanish and in the prescribed format, must be produced; (2) the Ecuadorian efficiency classes use their own boundaries, so a product's Chinese GB 30255 grade does not translate directly; (3) label evidence forms part of the Certificate of Conformity dossier rather than a separate self-declared registry like EU EPREL. Confirm the exact RTE INEN energy-labelling regulation, the lm/W class boundaries, and the label artwork rules in force before printing packaging.
gap.zh: 欧盟将具约束力的生态设计最低能效阈值（法规 2019/2020）与 A-G 能效标签配套；厄瓜多尔则主要依靠适用 RTE INEN 法规下的能效标签，将欧盟“生态设计”义务主要对应为标签要求，而非欧盟式硬性能效下限。对中国出口商的主要差距：（1）中国 CEL 不被接受——须制作西班牙语、按规定格式的厄瓜多尔能效标签；（2）厄瓜多尔能效等级采用自有界限，故产品的中国 GB 30255 等级不能直接换算；（3）标签证据属于符合性证书档案的一部分，而非欧盟 EPREL 那样独立自我声明的登记系统。印制包装前请确认现行 RTE INEN 能效标签法规、lm/W 等级界限及标签设计规则。
gap.zht: 歐盟將具約束力的生態設計最低能效閾值（法規 2019/2020）與 A-G 能效標籤配套；厄瓜多爾則主要依靠適用 RTE INEN 法規下的能效標籤，將歐盟「生態設計」義務主要對應為標籤要求，而非歐盟式硬性能效下限。對中國出口商的主要差距：（1）中國 CEL 不被接受——須製作西班牙語、按規定格式的厄瓜多爾能效標籤；（2）厄瓜多爾能效等級採用自有界限，故產品的中國 GB 30255 等級不能直接換算；（3）標籤證據屬於符合性證書檔案的一部分，而非歐盟 EPREL 那樣獨立自我聲明的登記系統。印製包裝前請確認現行 RTE INEN 能效標籤法規、lm/W 等級界限及標籤設計規則。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (where in scope) — an energy-efficiency label under the applicable RTE INEN energy-labelling regulation is required for regulated lighting products, with label evidence forming part of the Certificate of Conformity dossier
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP and affixing required under GB 30255 before market placement

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuador requires an energy-efficiency label for regulated lighting products under the applicable RTE INEN regulation — this is the practical mapping of the EU 'ecodesign' obligation onto a labelling requirement, without an EU-style binding minimum-efficacy floor. China's CEL is not recognized; a Spanish-language Ecuadorian label in the prescribed format must be produced and included in the Certificate of Conformity dossier. Chinese GB 30255 grades do not translate directly to Ecuadorian classes. Confirm the current RTE INEN energy-labelling regulation and label format before printing packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔依据适用 RTE INEN 法规对受管制照明产品要求能效标签——这是将欧盟“生态设计”义务实务性对应为标签要求，并无欧盟式具约束力的最低能效下限。中国 CEL 不被认可；须制作西班牙语、按规定格式的厄瓜多尔标签并纳入符合性证书档案。中国 GB 30255 等级不能直接换算为厄瓜多尔等级。印制包装前请确认现行 RTE INEN 能效标签法规及标签格式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多爾依據適用 RTE INEN 法規對受管制照明產品要求能效標籤——這是將歐盟「生態設計」義務實務性對應為標籤要求，並無歐盟式具約束力的最低能效下限。中國 CEL 不被認可；須製作西班牙語、按規定格式的厄瓜多爾標籤並納入符合性證書檔案。中國 GB 30255 等級不能直接換算為厄瓜多爾等級。印製包裝前請確認現行 RTE INEN 能效標籤法規及標籤格式。

requirement_topic.en: Performance / Minimum Efficacy Expectations vs EU Ecodesign Floor
requirement_topic.zh: 性能 / 最低能效预期与欧盟生态设计下限对比
requirement_topic.zht: 性能 / 最低能效預期與歐盟生態設計下限對比

summary.en: Ecuador does not impose an EU-style binding minimum-efficacy Ecodesign floor (the EU's Reg 2019/2020 hard lm/W, CRI, lifetime, and power-factor minimums for market entry). Instead, performance is communicated through the energy-efficiency label and the applicable NTE INEN performance standard (e.g., the Ecuadorian adoption of IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps — performance requirements), referenced where the RTE INEN regulation or conformity-assessment scope requires it. Practical performance expectations therefore come from the labelling classes and any performance requirements cited in the regulation, not from a single mandatory efficacy threshold. Products must still operate correctly at Ecuador's 120/220 V, 60 Hz supply, which affects driver efficiency, power factor, and flicker.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔不设欧盟式具约束力的最低能效生态设计下限（欧盟法规 2019/2020 用于市场准入的硬性 lm/W、显色指数、寿命及功率因数最低值）。性能通过能效标签及适用 NTE INEN 性能标准（如厄瓜多尔对 IEC 62612 自镇流 LED 灯性能要求的采用）传达，在 RTE INEN 法规或合格评定范围要求时引用。因此实务性能预期来自标签等级及法规引用的任何性能要求，而非单一强制能效阈值。产品仍须在厄瓜多尔 120/220 V、60 Hz 供电下正常运行，这影响驱动效率、功率因数及闪烁。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾不設歐盟式具約束力的最低能效生態設計下限（歐盟法規 2019/2020 用於市場准入的硬性 lm/W、顯色指數、壽命及功率因數最低值）。性能通過能效標籤及適用 NTE INEN 性能標準（如厄瓜多爾對 IEC 62612 自鎮流 LED 燈性能要求的採用）傳達，在 RTE INEN 法規或合格評定範圍要求時引用。因此實務性能預期來自標籤等級及法規引用的任何性能要求，而非單一強制能效閾值。產品仍須在厄瓜多爾 120/220 V、60 Hz 供電下正常運行，這影響驅動效率、功率因數及閃爍。

standards_or_laws: NTE INEN performance standard for lamps (Ecuadorian adoption of IEC 62612 — performance requirements for self-ballasted LED lamps, where referenced)
RTE INEN energy-labelling technical regulation — sets the efficiency-class framework rather than a single binding efficacy floor

summary.en: China's GB 30255 sets absolute lm/W efficiency grades and a market-entry minimum (Grade 3), administered with the mandatory China Energy Label. China additionally has performance standards such as GB/T 24908 (performance requirements for self-ballasted LED lamps). For market entry in China, a luminaire must at least meet the GB 30255 minimum grade and carry the CEL. This is a defined absolute floor, unlike Ecuador's primarily label-based approach.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 30255 规定绝对 lm/W 能效等级及市场准入最低值（3 级），并配合强制性中国能效标识管理。中国另有性能标准，如 GB/T 24908（自镇流 LED 灯性能要求）。在中国市场准入，灯具至少须满足 GB 30255 最低等级并贴附 CEL。这是明确的绝对下限，不同于厄瓜多尔主要以标签为基础的方式。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 30255 規定絕對 lm/W 能效等級及市場准入最低值（3 級），並配合強制性中國能效標識管理。中國另有性能標準，如 GB/T 24908（自鎮流 LED 燈性能要求）。在中國市場准入，燈具至少須滿足 GB 30255 最低等級並貼附 CEL。這是明確的絕對下限，不同於厄瓜多爾主要以標籤為基礎的方式。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency grades and minimum allowable values for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR — defines a market-entry minimum grade)
GB/T 24908 — Performance requirements for self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62612)

gap.en: The EU 'ecodesign' obligation is mapped here onto Ecuador's labelling-led framework, not a hard efficacy floor: unlike the EU, Ecuador does not block market entry on a single binding minimum lm/W / CRI / lifetime / power-factor threshold. The practical consequence for a Chinese exporter: (1) a product that meets China's GB 30255 minimum grade is not automatically blocked from Ecuador, but it must still be correctly labelled with the Ecuadorian energy-efficiency class and meet any performance requirements the RTE INEN regulation references (e.g., via the NTE INEN adoption of IEC 62612); (2) because there is no EU-style hard floor, the binding constraint is the labelling accuracy and the Certificate of Conformity rather than a pass/fail efficacy gate; (3) the 60 Hz / 120-220 V supply must be accounted for in declared efficacy and power factor, since values measured at 220 V 50 Hz may not hold. Where the EU would demand a redesign to clear a minimum-efficacy floor, Ecuador instead demands accurate class declaration and conformity documentation.
gap.zh: 此处将欧盟“生态设计”义务对应到厄瓜多尔以标签为主导的框架，而非硬性能效下限：与欧盟不同，厄瓜多尔不以单一具约束力的最低 lm/W / 显色指数 / 寿命 / 功率因数阈值阻断市场准入。对中国出口商的实务后果：（1）满足中国 GB 30255 最低等级的产品不会自动被厄瓜多尔阻断，但仍须正确标注厄瓜多尔能效等级，并满足 RTE INEN 法规引用的任何性能要求（如通过 NTE INEN 对 IEC 62612 的采用）；（2）由于无欧盟式硬性下限，约束在于标签准确性及符合性证书，而非合格 / 不合格的能效门槛；（3）须就 60 Hz / 120-220 V 供电核算所声明的光效及功率因数，因为在 220 V 50 Hz 下测得的数值可能不成立。在欧盟须重新设计以越过最低能效下限之处，厄瓜多尔则要求准确的等级声明及符合性文件。
gap.zht: 此處將歐盟「生態設計」義務對應到厄瓜多爾以標籤為主導的框架，而非硬性能效下限：與歐盟不同，厄瓜多爾不以單一具約束力的最低 lm/W / 顯色指數 / 壽命 / 功率因數閾值阻斷市場准入。對中國出口商的實務後果：（1）滿足中國 GB 30255 最低等級的產品不會自動被厄瓜多爾阻斷，但仍須正確標註厄瓜多爾能效等級，並滿足 RTE INEN 法規引用的任何性能要求（如通過 NTE INEN 對 IEC 62612 的採用）；（2）由於無歐盟式硬性下限，約束在於標籤準確性及符合性證書，而非合格 / 不合格的能效門檻；（3）須就 60 Hz / 120-220 V 供電核算所聲明的光效及功率因數，因為在 220 V 50 Hz 下測得的數值可能不成立。在歐盟須重新設計以越過最低能效下限之處，厄瓜多爾則要求準確的等級聲明及符合性文件。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — Ecuador has no EU-style binding minimum-efficacy Ecodesign floor; performance is governed by the energy-efficiency label classes and any NTE INEN performance requirements referenced by the applicable RTE INEN regulation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum grade) — GB 30255 Grade 3 is the market-entry minimum in China; China Energy Label registration required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Unlike the EU, Ecuador does not impose a binding minimum-efficacy Ecodesign floor for market entry; the EU 'ecodesign' obligation maps mainly onto Ecuador's energy-efficiency labelling plus any NTE INEN performance requirements referenced by the RTE INEN regulation. A product meeting China's GB 30255 minimum grade is not automatically blocked, but it must carry an accurate Ecuadorian efficiency-class label and satisfy any referenced performance standard. Declared efficacy and power factor must hold at Ecuador's 120/220 V 60 Hz supply, not only at 220 V 50 Hz. Confirm the current label classes and referenced performance standard before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 与欧盟不同，厄瓜多尔不对市场准入设置具约束力的最低能效生态设计下限；欧盟“生态设计”义务主要对应为厄瓜多尔能效标签及 RTE INEN 法规引用的任何 NTE INEN 性能要求。满足中国 GB 30255 最低等级的产品不会自动被阻断，但须标注准确的厄瓜多尔能效等级标签并满足任何被引用的性能标准。所声明的光效及功率因数须在厄瓜多尔 120/220 V 60 Hz 供电下成立，而不仅在 220 V 50 Hz 下。出货前请确认现行标签等级及被引用的性能标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 與歐盟不同，厄瓜多爾不對市場准入設置具約束力的最低能效生態設計下限；歐盟「生態設計」義務主要對應為厄瓜多爾能效標籤及 RTE INEN 法規引用的任何 NTE INEN 性能要求。滿足中國 GB 30255 最低等級的產品不會自動被阻斷，但須標註準確的厄瓜多爾能效等級標籤並滿足任何被引用的性能標準。所聲明的光效及功率因數須在厄瓜多爾 120/220 V 60 Hz 供電下成立，而不僅在 220 V 50 Hz 下。出貨前請確認現行標籤等級及被引用的性能標準。
